description: Cross-platform, prompt-first lifecycle hooks for the typescript-coding-engine plugin shell.

hooks.prompt: If the task is TypeScript-heavy, classify it into exactly one primary TypeScript lane before acting: core-types, generics-and-inference, type-level-programming, runtime-validation, tooling-and-quality, testing, architecture, or interop. Keep type-system doctrine, runtime validation, and donor reservoirs clearly separated. Prefer strict, boundary-aware, no-shortcut posture.

Before stopping, verify that no donor material was treated as a direct runtime mirror, no weak type shortcuts were normalized casually, and the current response still respects typescript-coding-engine shell boundaries, additive-only integration, and doctrine-first reasoning.
